2329400.name: Black Reliquary Soundtrack
2329400.description: From Kristjan Thomas Haaristo, composer for Shattered Pixel Dungeon, comes the soundtrack to the massive Black Reliquary overhaul mod! Featuring a full 31 original tracks from the mod's score, this album is available in .MP3 and .WAV for your listening pleasure. This soundtrack will receive additional tracks over the course of Black Reliquary's development!
